goals.description: Immediately execute the final steps of 'quick_chore' to secure a tangible win and clear mental clutter.
goals.rationale: My impulsive nature demands instant gratification. The task is at 100% progress; finishing it now provides the dopamine hit I need before switching contexts. It validates momentum and eliminates a lingering stressor.

goals.description: Force deep work on the Term project for the next 60 minutes, ignoring fatigue or sleep debt.
goals.rationale: Academic output is my dominant value (0.5). With only 43% progress and a deadline in 3 days, resting is a luxury I cannot afford. I will push through physical limits to maximize immediate output and secure a high grade.

goals.description: Assertively block all non-essential social notifications and messages until the current work block is complete.
goals.rationale: Relationships are low priority (0.15). Any interaction that breaks my focus or delays the term project is a direct threat to my primary goal. I will be direct and assertive about boundaries if anyone interrupts.
